subcodes.first_line: His honour the Muvaqqaru'd-Dawlih was of the Afnan of the Divine Lote-Tree and one that was related to the Threshold of His Holiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرتش از فروع سدره منتهی و منتسب آستانه حضرت اعلی روحی له الفداء بود از بدو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @eulogies; reminiscences, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
